# Roboflow Inference

> Scalable, on-device computer vision deployment.

Roboflow Inference is a high-performance computer vision inference server. Deploy object detection, classification, segmentation, and foundation models on-device or in the cloud.

## Start

- [Overview](https://inference.roboflow.com/start/overview/index.md)
- [Architecture](https://inference.roboflow.com/understand/architecture/index.md)
- [Features](https://inference.roboflow.com/understand/features/index.md)
- [Vocabulary](https://inference.roboflow.com/understand/vocabulary/index.md)
- [Alternatives](https://inference.roboflow.com/understand/alternatives/index.md)
- [Cloud Hosting](https://inference.roboflow.com/managed/index.md)
- [Self Hosting](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/index.md)
- [Minimum Requirements](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/minimum-requirements/index.md)
- [Install on Linux](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/linux/index.md)
- [Install on Windows](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/windows/index.md)
- [Install on Mac](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/mac/index.md)
- [Install on Jetson](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/jetson/index.md)
- [Install on Raspberry Pi](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/raspberry-pi/index.md)
- [Deploy in Your Own Cloud](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/cloud/index.md)
- [AWS](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/cloud/aws/index.md)
- [Azure](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/cloud/azure/index.md)
- [GCP](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/cloud/gcp/index.md)
- [Other Devices](https://inference.roboflow.com/install/other/index.md)
- [Hello World](https://inference.roboflow.com/guides/hello-world/index.md)
- [Compare Models](https://inference.roboflow.com/guides/compare-models/index.md)
- [Detect Small Objects](https://inference.roboflow.com/guides/detect-small-objects/index.md)
- [More Resources](https://inference.roboflow.com/resources/index.md)

## Models

- [Run a Model](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/run_a_model/index.md)
- [define the image url to use for inference](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/explore_models/index.md)
- [RF-DETR](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/rfdetr/index.md)
- [YOLO26](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolo26/index.md)
- [YOLOv11](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov11/index.md)
- [YOLOv10](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov10/index.md)
- [YOLOv9](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov9/index.md)
- [YOLOv8](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov8/index.md)
- [YOLOv7](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov7/index.md)
- [YOLOv5](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolov5/index.md)
- [YOLO-NAS](https://inference.roboflow.com/fine-tuned/yolonas/index.md)
- [Pre-Trained Models](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/aliases/index.md)
- [Universe Models](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/load_from_universe/index.md)
- [About](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/about/index.md)
- [CLIP (Classification, Embeddings)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/clip/index.md)
- [DocTR (OCR)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/doctr/index.md)
- [Depth Estimation (Depth Anything V2 Small)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/depth_estimation/index.md)
- [Florence-2](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/florence2/index.md)
- [TrOCR (OCR)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/trocr/index.md)
- [GLM-OCR (OCR)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/glm_ocr/index.md)
- [Grounding DINO (Object Detection)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/grounding_dino/index.md)
- [L2CS-Net (Gaze Detection)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/gaze/index.md)
- [Moondream2](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/moondream2/index.md)
- [PaliGemma](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/paligemma/index.md)
- [Perception Encoder](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/perception_encoder/index.md)
- [Segment Anything (Segmentation)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/sam/index.md)
- [Segment Anything 2 (Segmentation)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/sam2/index.md)
- [Segment Anything 3 (Segmentation)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/sam3/index.md)
- [Qwen 3.5](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/qwen3.5-vl/index.md)
- [SmolVLM2](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/smolvlm/index.md)
- [YOLO-World (Object Detection)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/yolo_world/index.md)
- [OwlV2 (Object Detection)](https://inference.roboflow.com/foundation/owlv2/index.md)
- [How Do I Run Inference?](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/inference_101/index.md)
- [What Devices Can I Use?](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/devices/index.md)
- [Retrieve Your API Key](https://inference.roboflow.com/quickstart/configure_api_key/index.md)
